I can schedule that. A couple quick clarifying items before I create the event:

- I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19: you have "Project Kick-off" 10:00–11:00 and a one-on-one 11:00–11:30, so 10:00 is not available.
- The earliest 1-hour slot that day is 11:30–12:30. Other options I can use instead: 09:00–10:00 or any afternoon slot (e.g., 13:00–14:00). Which do you prefer if 11:30–12:30 doesn’t work?

Please confirm these details (or tell me changes):
1. Time to book: 11:30–12:30 (suggested) or pick another from above.
2. Title: I can use "Follow-up Meeting" (suggested) or a title you prefer.
3. Short description (suggested: "Follow-up to discuss progress and action items from the kick-off."): OK to use this or provide your text.
4. Participants to invite (emails), or should I leave only you as the attendee?
5. Location or virtual link (e.g., Office 44A, Teams/Zoom), or leave blank.

If you confirm (or say “go ahead with defaults”), I’ll create the event and invite participants.
